---
title: "Supplemental figures — NMD long-read manuscript"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    self_contained: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("."))
```

Every supplemental figure is generated by a self-contained render script in this
folder, each reading the data bundle from `nmd_fig_data/` (the analysis-derived
inputs; see the top-level data-availability note) and writing into
`supplement_figures/`. Each render script was extracted from the manuscript's
analysis Rmds (noted per section) so the figure can be reproduced in isolation.

```{r helpers}
RSCRIPT <- file.path(R.home("bin"), "Rscript")
run_r <- function(script) {
  stopifnot(file.exists(script))
  out <- system2(RSCRIPT, shQuote(script), stdout = TRUE, stderr = TRUE)
  cat(paste(utils::tail(out, 10), collapse = "\n"), "\n")
  st <- attr(out, "status"); if (!is.null(st) && st != 0) stop(sprintf("%s failed (exit %s)", script, st))
  invisible(out)
}
show_fig <- function(pat) {
  hits <- list.files("supplement_figures", pattern = pat, full.names = TRUE)
  if (!length(hits)) { cat("Not found:", pat, "\n"); return(invisible()) }
  knitr::include_graphics(hits[order(nchar(hits))])
}
```

# S — Short-read vs long-read gene-expression correlation, by cell type
Source: `correlation_analysis.Rmd`.
```{r s-corr, results='hide'}
run_r("render_sr_lr_correlation.R")
```
```{r s-corr-show, echo=FALSE, out.width='100%'}
show_fig("sr_vs_lr_expression_by_celltype_panel\\.png$")
```

# S — Isoform length distribution
Source: `Isoform_Landscape.Rmd`.
```{r s-len, results='hide'}
run_r("render_isoform_length.R")
```
```{r s-len-show, echo=FALSE, out.width='100%'}
show_fig("length_distribution\\.png$")
```

# S — Pairwise expression similarity
Source: `Isoform_Landscape.Rmd`.
```{r s-pair, results='hide'}
run_r("render_pairwise_expression.R")
```
```{r s-pair-show, echo=FALSE, out.width='100%'}
show_fig("pairwise_expression_similarity")
```

# S — SQANTI3 structural categories
Source: `Isoform_Landscape.Rmd`.
```{r s-sqanti, results='hide'}
run_r("render_sqanti_categories.R")
```
```{r s-sqanti-show, echo=FALSE, out.width='100%'}
show_fig("structural_categories\\.png$")
```

# S — mashr pairwise sharing (LR isoform)
Source: `Isoform_Level_Quantification.Rmd` §8.7. NOTE: rebuilds the isoform mashr
model, ~3 min.
```{r s-sharing, results='hide'}
run_r("render_mashr_sharing.R")
```
```{r s-sharing-show, echo=FALSE, out.width='100%'}
show_fig("sharing_heatmap_lr_iso\\.png$")
```

# S — Isoform proportion vs expression (all + NMD-only)
Source: `interpret_isoform_patterns_mashr_2026.3.10.Rmd`.
```{r s-prop, results='hide'}
run_r("render_proportion_vs_expression.R")
```
```{r s-prop-show, echo=FALSE, out.width='100%'}
show_fig("^q3_")
```

# S — % transcriptional output lost (gene level)
Source: `transcriptional_output.Rmd`.
```{r s-lost-gene, results='hide'}
run_r("render_output_lost_gene.R")
```
```{r s-lost-gene-show, echo=FALSE, out.width='100%'}
show_fig("pct_output_lost_gene_level")
```

# S — Per-isoform output lost
Source: `transcriptional_output.Rmd`.
```{r s-lost-iso, results='hide'}
run_r("render_output_lost_per_isoform.R")
```
```{r s-lost-iso-show, echo=FALSE, out.width='100%'}
show_fig("isoform_frac_lost")
```

# S — Output lost, CPM-difference-floor sweep + non-NMD deflation
Threshold sensitivity control (author-added).
```{r s-thresh, results='hide'}
run_r("render_output_lost_threshold.R")
```
```{r s-thresh-show, echo=FALSE, out.width='100%'}
show_fig("figureS3_output_lost_threshold\\.png$")
```

# S — Normalization sanity (non-NMD DMSO vs adjusted-SMG1i)
Source: `productive_response.Rmd`.
```{r s-norm, results='hide'}
run_r("make_norm_sanity.R")
```
```{r s-norm-show, echo=FALSE, out.width='100%'}
show_fig("figureS3_norm_sanity\\.png$")
```

# S — Reproducibility battery
Source: `productive_response.Rmd`.
```{r s-repro, results='hide'}
run_r("make_reproducibility_battery.R")
```
```{r s-repro-show, echo=FALSE, out.width='100%'}
show_fig("figureS3_reproducibility\\.png$")
```

# S — KEGG ER-stress pathway across cell types
```{r s-path, results='hide'}
run_r("make_pathway_allct.R")
system2(Sys.which("python"), shQuote(file.path("fig_panels","figure_pathway_allct.py")))
```
```{r s-path-show, echo=FALSE, out.width='100%'}
if (file.exists("fig_panels/figure_pathway_allct.png")) knitr::include_graphics("fig_panels/figure_pathway_allct.png")
```

# S — SRSF isoform structures
Source: `rbp_sr.Rmd`.
```{r s-srsf, results='hide'}
run_r("make_sr_isopair.R")
```
```{r s-srsf-show, echo=FALSE, out.width='100%'}
srsf <- list.files("supplement_figures", pattern = "^SR_SRSF.*\\.png$", full.names = TRUE)
if (length(srsf)) knitr::include_graphics(srsf) else cat("no SR_SRSF*.png\n")
```

# S — Cell-type-specific NMD
```{r s-ct, results='hide'}
run_r("ct_specific_nmd_analysis.R")
```
```{r s-ct-show, echo=FALSE, out.width='100%'}
if (file.exists("ct_specific_nmd_report/figS_ct_specific_nmd_composite.png"))
  knitr::include_graphics("ct_specific_nmd_report/figS_ct_specific_nmd_composite.png")
```

# S — NMD machinery expression / activity
```{r s-mach, results='hide'}
run_r("_nmd_machinery_report.R")
```
```{r s-mach-show, echo=FALSE, out.width='100%'}
for (f in c("substrate_panel_heatmap.png","machinery_heatmap.png","canonical_isoform_cpm.png"))
  if (file.exists(file.path("nmd_machinery_report", f))) print(knitr::include_graphics(file.path("nmd_machinery_report", f)))
```

# Session info
```{r session, echo=FALSE}
sessionInfo()
```
